text.content: MAXAM INVESTS IN THE EVER-GROWING GLOBAL AGRICULTURAL PROGRAM

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM INVESTS IN THE EVER-GROWING GLOBAL AGRICULTURAL PROGRAM

text.content: Announcing the New Vice President of the Global Agricultural Program

rich_text.plain_text: Announcing the New Vice President of the Global Agricultural Program

text.content: [Danvers, Massachusetts, June 23rd, 2020] As MAXAM Tire grows exponentially, we continue to invest in our people, products and programs. We are pleased to announce the appointment of a strong, proven industry leader, Gregory Gilland as the new Vice President of the Global Agricultural Program.

rich_text.plain_text: [Danvers, Massachusetts, June 23rd, 2020] As MAXAM Tire grows exponentially, we continue to invest in our people, products and programs. We are pleased to announce the appointment of a strong, proven industry leader, Gregory Gilland as the new Vice President of the Global Agricultural Program.

text.content: Agriculture is one of the most technically demanding industries that requires a team of experts.  Greg assumes this key leadership position with years of valuable industry experience and a great depth of market knowledge. Greg will lead our team of experts in providing relevant solutions to the agricultural industry while ensuring the highest level of customer experience.

rich_text.plain_text: Agriculture is one of the most technically demanding industries that requires a team of experts.  Greg assumes this key leadership position with years of valuable industry experience and a great depth of market knowledge. Greg will lead our team of experts in providing relevant solutions to the agricultural industry while ensuring the highest level of customer experience.

text.content: “The agricultural challenge for any grower is to maximize productivity in search of greater yields while also managing evolving costs to ensure improved profits. MAXAM’s market vision is to bring agricultural radial tires that provide the business solutions growers are seeking by delivering improved product performance and uncompromised quality at competitive prices,” says Greg Gilland, Vice President of Global Agriculture.

rich_text.plain_text: “The agricultural challenge for any grower is to maximize productivity in search of greater yields while also managing evolving costs to ensure improved profits. MAXAM’s market vision is to bring agricultural radial tires that provide the business solutions growers are seeking by delivering improved product performance and uncompromised quality at competitive prices,” says Greg Gilland, Vice President of Global Agriculture.

text.content: Greg first joined MAXAM Tire as the North American Segment Manager of Agricultural Tires in 2018. Over the last two years, Greg has played a major role in evolving the MAXAM agricultural segment by effectively leading our team to achieve sustainable growth. Prior to joining the MAXAM, Greg built over 20 years of experience in the tire industry with eight years dedicated to the agricultural industry, working primarily with global agricultural original equipment manufacturers.  Before working in the tire industry, Greg served in the U.S. Navy for 15 years as a Naval Officer.

rich_text.plain_text: Greg first joined MAXAM Tire as the North American Segment Manager of Agricultural Tires in 2018. Over the last two years, Greg has played a major role in evolving the MAXAM agricultural segment by effectively leading our team to achieve sustainable growth. Prior to joining the MAXAM, Greg built over 20 years of experience in the tire industry with eight years dedicated to the agricultural industry, working primarily with global agricultural original equipment manufacturers.  Before working in the tire industry, Greg served in the U.S. Navy for 15 years as a Naval Officer.

text.content: “With a strong focus on developing and producing the best products for farmers and growers, Greg has given his commitment to delivering value through unparalleled quality and performance to customers. Greg’s pattern of success has increased our business and forged valuable relationships in the Industry. We are excited to have Greg take our agricultural segment to the next stage of growth and deliver unmatched solutions to customers globally,” concludes Troy Kline, President of MAXAM Tire North America.
